title: Grilled Steak Kebabs
description: A simple and flavorful grilled steak kebab recipe, perfect for a gluten-free dinner. Marinate the sirloin tips in a mix of Mediterranean spices and grill to perfection.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Mediterranean Spice Mix, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Add the sirloin tips to the marinade and coat evenly.
Let the sirloin tips marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the sirloin tips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
